title: Neural QCD: Cornell Potential & DIS
shortDescription: A Rust-based quantum chromodynamics simulation that trains a neural network on the Cornell potential and visualizes deep inelastic electron-quark scattering through an interactive desktop interface.
highlights: Four-layer neural network trained to approximate the Cornell quark-antiquark potential.
Deep inelastic scattering simulation with electron trajectories and angular statistics.
Interactive three-panel GUI for training loss, potential comparison, and scattering paths.
JSON session persistence and timestamped scientific plot exports for reproducible runs.
